title: distrianthes molliflora
intro: Distrianthes molliflora, also known as the African tree marigold, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and fever. The health benefits of Distrianthes molliflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
